title: Raine Durasha
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Raine Durasha |homeworld=[[Lankashiir]]{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)}} |birth= |death=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] (35:2 GrS), [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= *[[Reise Durasha]] |partners= |siblings= |children= *[[Jak Durasha]] *[[Bern Durasha]] *[[Celia Durasha]] |affiliation=*[[Durasha family]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I just spoke with Raine last week. His unit was preparing to ship out to Ralltiir — some kind of local trouble, I suppose. I miss them all terribly, but especially Raine.''"
"''I guess that's natural — he is your twin brother, after all.|Celia Durasha and [[Adion Lang]]|}} '''Raine Durasha''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]]. His unit was deployed to [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] during the Imperial [[Subjugation of Ralltiir|subjugation of the world]]. Durasha was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when his unit was ambushed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces at the [[Grallia Spaceport|spaceport]] [[1 BBY/Legends|shortly before]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He was the twin brother of [[Celia Durasha]]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} *{{JournalCite|14|Crimson Bounty}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Raine Durasha }} ===Cancelled appearances=== *"[[The Contact]]" {{DEFAULTSORT:Durasha, Raine}} [[Category:Galactic Empire military personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
